Description.English:
A pattern, no more than a mere waveform, etched into the surface of a tiny metallic shard. This fragment of data represents a recording of the electrical impulses running across a neural network. Many fragments would be required to recreate any sensible experience.

Generated by the interaction of the Animus Beam with a living target.
Description.SimplifiedChinese:
一个仅仅是波形的图案，蚀刻在一块微小的金属碎片的表面。这种数据碎片能呈现神经网络中电脉冲的记录。需要很多碎片才能重现有意义的体验。

产生于阿尼玛斯光束与一个活体目标的互动。
Description.TraditionalChinese:
一個類似波形的圖案刻在微小金屬碎片的表面上。這個資料碎片代表電子脈衝在神經網絡傳遞的紀錄。需要收集許多碎片才能重建有意義的體驗。

由無生命光束與活體目標互動後產生。

PinObjectiveTip.English:
Fragmented Qualia are bits of data, each representing a recording of the electrical impulses running across a neural network. Many fragments would be required to recreate any sensible experience.
Generated by the interaction of the Animus Beam with a living target.
PinObjectiveTip.SimplifiedChinese:
破碎的感质由一系列的数据碎片构成，这些碎片能呈现神经网络中电脉冲的记录。需要很多碎片才能重现有意义的体验。
自阿尼玛斯光束与活体目标的交互中产生。
PinObjectiveTip.TraditionalChinese:
分裂感質是資料碎片，每個碎片都代表電子脈衝在神經網絡傳遞的紀錄。需要收集許多碎片才能重建有意義的體驗。
由無生命光束與活體目標互動後產生。

PinObjectiveMessage.English: Generated qualia from the interaction of the Animus Beam with a living creature
PinObjectiveMessage.SimplifiedChinese: 自阿尼玛斯光束与活体生物的交互中产生的感质
PinObjectiveMessage.TraditionalChinese: 無生命光束與生物互動後產生的感質
